title: How SMP
description: A Fun modpack containing tons of mods such as create. farmers delight, and more!
body:
**Overview:**
A fun and mystical mod pack for friends. Contains mods such as create, farmers delight, and even some mods made by server members such as [How Hats](https://modrinth.com/mod/how-hats) (being added soon). Occasional updates coming with new mods being added soon such as Scorched Guns 2 and others.You can find the official how smp site here: [How Site](https://sites.google.com/view/howsmp?usp=sharing)

**Mod/Texture Pack Compatibility:**
- Very glitchy with optifine
- Texture packs might crash the game 

**General FAQ:**

Q: Can I add mods? 
A: Of Course! some mods may crash and you can report it here: [Mod Crash Report](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfw4SuDoUrm7697ELf-Ey6HdBAH7xFyqUXMbzf0VhMyQP2Daw/viewform?usp=sharing)

 
Q: Can I re-upload this modpack with more mods?
A: Yes, But Make sure to credit it and add new original mods


**Some Mods To Credit:**
- [Macaw's Paths](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-paths-and-pavings)
- [JER](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/just-enough-resources-jer)
- [Macaw's Windows](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-windows)
- [Macaw's Furniture](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-furniture)
- [Gravestones Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/gravestones)
- [Macaw's Trapdoors](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-trapdoors)
- [Macaw's Lights](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-lights-and-lamps)
- [Ars-Nouveau](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ars-nouveau)
